products.name: Buy As You Go Fence
products.description: Same extrusions as QSHS — spacers sold individually per-run rather than in pre-packs. Uses dedicated BAYG height lookup table. F-Channel (not F-Section) for void fixing.

metadata.notes: Alumawood is a timber-look powder coat finish variant of the QSHS system. Uses AW-/AWQS- prefix SKUs. Same calculation rules as QSHS. Not a separate system — select via finish option within QSHS.

options.accessory_colour_note: All post accessories (base plates, dress rings, top plates, domical covers) are Terrain (TR) only

rule_sets.name: BAYG Fence Rules
rule_sets.description: Data-driven BAYG buy-as-you-go fence BOM rules v4.1

rule_versions.notes: Initial BAYG rules based on CTS V4.1. Slat count from VLOOKUP against BAYG_ScrHts table — seed the lookup table separately.

product_constraints.name: max_panel_width_mm
product_constraints.message: Panel width above 2600mm not supported; split into additional panels.

product_variables.name: slat_gap_mm
product_variables.label: Slat Gap
product_variables.notes: BAYG: fully variable gap — any integer >= 0mm. Custom spacing supported.

product_variables.name: mounting_method
product_variables.label: Post Mounting Method
product_variables.notes: Drives accessory selection: base_plate→BP+DC; core_drill→DR; in_ground→no accessories

product_validations.name: panel_width_in_range
product_validations.message: Panel width must be between 300mm and 2600mm.

product_rules.name: num_slats
product_rules.notes: BAYG uses BAYG_ScrHts VLOOKUP in the CTS spreadsheet. Approximated here with same QSHS formula; engine should override via lookup table when BAYG_ScrHts is seeded.

product_rules.name: spacer_qty
product_rules.notes: BAYG spacers are snap-in, sold individually per-run (not in 50-packs like QSHS). 2*(slats+1) per panel.

product_rules.name: num_posts
product_rules.notes: Engine-supplied count of post boundary positions for this run

product_rules.name: post_length_mm
product_rules.notes: Posts supplied in 6000mm lengths; cut to required height in field

product_rules.name: emit_post_50_6000
product_rules.notes: 6000mm FP post for taller fences; requires top plate

product_rules.name: emit_post_65_2400
product_rules.notes: 2400mm HD post; not available in primrose or paperbark

product_rules.name: emit_top_plate_50
product_rules.notes: Top plate caps 6000mm FP post; 1 per post

product_rules.name: emit_base_plate_50
product_rules.notes: Base plate set for surface-mount 50mm FP post

product_rules.name: emit_domical_cover_50
product_rules.notes: Domical cover over base plate bolt heads; 1 per post

product_rules.name: emit_dress_ring_50
product_rules.notes: Dress ring covers core-drill penetration; 1 per post

product_rules.name: emit_top_plate_65
product_rules.notes: Top plate for 6000mm HD post; 1 per post

product_rules.name: emit_base_plate_65
product_rules.notes: Base plate set for surface-mount 65mm HD post

product_rules.name: emit_domical_cover_65
product_rules.notes: Domical cover for HD base plate; 1 per post

product_rules.name: emit_dress_ring_65
product_rules.notes: Dress ring for 65mm HD core-drill install; 1 per post

product_companion_rules.notes: 6000mm FP post always needs top plate cap; 1 per post
6000mm HD post always needs top plate cap; 1 per post
Domical cover is already emitted by rule; companion enforces pairing if base plate is manually added

product_warnings.message: BAYG spacers are snap-in type, sold individually per-run — not in pre-packs like QSHS.
BAYG uses the BAYG_ScrHts lookup table for slat count. Verify against official height chart.
65mm HD posts are not available in Primrose (P) or Paperbark (PB). Please select a different colour for HD posts, or switch to 50mm FP posts.
In-ground mounting: no post accessories required. Ensure min 450mm embedment depth (increase for soft soil).
Heights above 2100mm require 6000mm posts. A top plate cap has been automatically included.
